steps.title: Factor out the greatest common factor
steps.content: Both terms in $12x+27$ are divisible by $3$: $$12x+27=3(4x)+3(9).$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is correct. Expanding A gives $108x+12$, B gives $324x+27$, and D gives $27x+72$. Only choice C expands back to the original expression, so it is the equivalent form.
